summary: Imam Didmar delivers a lecture at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson, emphasizing the importance of the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) beyond merely being a messenger who delivered the Quran. He discusses how the Prophet was a complete role model whose teachings and character (nur/light) transformed the hearts of his companions and spread Islam across continents. Imam Didmar explains that true faith penetrates the heart and results in behavioral transformation, exemplified by companions like Hassan ibn Thabit who recognized the divine nature of the Prophet's message. He contrasts the Arabs' ability to discern truth from falsehood through their cultural understanding of oratory with modern society's susceptibility to media manipulation.
suggested_title: The Prophet Muhammad as More Than a Messenger: His Character, Teachings, and Transformative Light
catchy_title: Why the Prophet Muhammad Changed Everything
